creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
Festival is a multi-lingual text-to-speech system.  This port is based on
the NetBSD port.  Please retain the line saying so, and the NetBSD tags,
when committing it.  At least one each of the festlex-* and festvox-*
ports is needed before this port will do anything.  I'll submit some of
those in a few minutes.  They are also available at
http://jpj.net/~trevor/freebsd/ports/ .

How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
